title: Emergency Department Management of AcuteAsthma Exacerbation in Childhood
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2tv6r","text":"Goal: Establish a protocol focusing on the first care of asthma exacerbation in children under 12 years old attending the emergency department of our institution, in the first four hours of initial care. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rrlg","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4fmdh","text":"Objectives: recognize and classify the severity of asthma exacerbation; administer early treatment with the best possible level of evidence; define criteria for hospitalization and discharge; define criteria for admission to the ICU; develop discharge guidelines to avoid unnecessary returns.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7rniv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Wilson Rocha MD
